query:
-- Insert text testimonials with diverse experiences
INSERT INTO testimonials (userId, userName, userEmail, rating, review, photoUrl, videoUrl, type, relatedId, status, isFeatured, createdAt) VALUES
(1, 'Sophie Martinez', 'sophie.m@example.com', 5, 'Elizabeth transformed my confidence completely! I came in as a total beginner, nervous about even wearing heels. After just 3 sessions, I''m dancing with grace and feeling amazing. Her teaching style is so encouraging and she breaks down every move perfectly. Best investment I''ve made in myself!', NULL, NULL, 'session', NULL, 'approved', true, DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 15 DAY)),

(1, 'Jessica Chen', 'jess.chen@example.com', 5, 'The online choreography course exceeded all my expectations! Elizabeth''s instruction is crystal clear, and I love that I can practice at my own pace. The community support is incredible too. I''ve learned 5 full routines and feel like a real dancer now. Worth every penny!', NULL, NULL, 'course', 1, 'approved', true, DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 22 DAY)),

(1, 'Amanda Foster', 'amanda.f@example.com', 5, 'I''ve been taking private sessions for 2 months and the progress is unreal. Elizabeth tailors every lesson to my goals and challenges. She helped me prepare for my wedding dance and everyone was blown away! Her energy is contagious and she makes you feel like a star.', NULL, NULL, 'session', NULL, 'approved', false, DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 8 DAY)),

(1, 'Maria Rodriguez', 'maria.r@example.com', 4, 'Great beginner-friendly class! Elizabeth is patient and explains technique really well. I''m still working on my balance in heels but I can already see improvement. The studio atmosphere is welcoming and non-judgmental. Looking forward to continuing my journey!', NULL, NULL, 'session', NULL, 'approved', false, DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 5 DAY)),

(1, 'Rachel Kim', 'rachel.k@example.com', 5, 'This is SO much more than just a dance class. Elizabeth teaches body awareness, confidence, and self-expression. I''ve struggled with self-esteem for years and these sessions have been therapeutic. Plus, I can actually dance in heels now which feels like a superpower!', NULL, NULL, 'session', NULL, 'approved', true, DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)),

(1, 'Olivia Thompson', 'olivia.t@example.com', 5, 'The technique masterclass was incredible! Elizabeth breaks down movements in a way that finally made sense to me. I''ve taken classes with other instructors but her approach is unique - she focuses on making it feel natural, not forced. My posture and fluidity have improved dramatically.', NULL, NULL, 'session', NULL, 'approved', false, DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 12 DAY)),

(1, 'Emma Wilson', 'emma.w@example.com', 5, 'Best decision ever! I signed up for the course bundle and I''m obsessed. Elizabeth''s teaching style is so clear and motivating. I practice every day now and my friends can''t believe the transformation. If you''re on the fence, just do it - you won''t regret it!', NULL, NULL, 'course', 2, 'approved', false, DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 18 DAY)),

(1, 'Isabella Santos', 'bella.santos@example.com', 5, 'Elizabeth is a phenomenal teacher! She creates such a safe, empowering space. I was intimidated at first but she made me feel comfortable immediately. Her feedback is always constructive and encouraging. I''ve gained so much confidence both on and off the dance floor!', NULL, NULL, 'session', NULL, 'approved', false, DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 DAY));

-- Insert video testimonials (using placeholder YouTube URLs - these would be real student testimonials)
INSERT INTO testimonials (userId, userName, userEmail, rating, review, photoUrl, videoUrl, type, relatedId, status, isFeatured, createdAt) VALUES
(1, 'Natalie Brooks', 'natalie.b@example.com', 5, 'Watch my journey from beginner to confident dancer! Elizabeth is amazing!', NULL, 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ', 'session', NULL, 'approved', true, DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 25 DAY)),

(1, 'Lauren Davis', 'lauren.d@example.com', 5, 'My transformation after 6 weeks of classes - I can''t believe this is me dancing!', NULL, 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ', 'course', 1, 'approved', false, DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 DAY));
